title: Da Pirate ModPack WIP
description: a modpack focusing on pirates, still in progress. you can do more than be a pirate tho!
body:
# Da Pirates ModPack
## main description
this is a modpack that is and will be focusing on **_pirates_**, but it will/has have more! raid **dungeons**, craft **guns**!

## WARNINGS
**this will be and forever be forge 1.20.1! so dont ask me when 1.21**

**I USE MULTIMC SO I DOWNLOADED JUST ENOUGH GUNS FROM CURSEFORGE!!!**
## OTHER

# MILESTONES!
- bosses
- boats
- more...
